english translation text: In the Name of Allah, the All-merciful, the All-compassionate

NONE DESERVE TO BE WORSHIPPED
EXCEPT ALLAH

THE TRUE ONE GOD AND
TO HIM ALONE WE ALL SUBMIT

NONE DESERVE TO BE WORSHIPPED
EXCEPT ALLAH

AND WE DO NOT WORSHIP ANYONE
OR ANYTHING OTHER THAN HIM
BEING SINCERE IN OUR FAITH TO HIM

EVEN THOUGH THE POLYTHEISTS
DETEST THIS!

NONE DESERVE TO BE WORSHIPPED
EXCEPT ALLAH

OUR PROVIDER AND THE PROVIDER
OF OUR FORE-FATHERS

NONE DESERVE TO BE WORSHIPPED
EXCEPT ALLAH
THE ONE, THE ONE, THE ONE
THE ONE WHO KEEPS HIS PROMISE
AND HELPED / HELPS HIS SERVANT
AND GRANTED ESTEEM TO HIS ARMY

AND WHO LEFT THE OTHER PARTIES
ALONE AND ABONDONED (THEM)

SO THEN TO HIM BELONGS
THE KINGDOM  AND TO HIM BELONGS THE PRAISE
HE GIVES LIFE AND CAUSES TO DIE

AND HE CAUSES TO DIE AND
HE GIVES LIFE

AND HE IS THE EVER LIVING AND
SHALL NEVER DIE
AND HIS POWER IS THE GOODNESS
AND HE HAS POWER OVER ALL THINGS
